commits.message: fix(admin): resolve team alerts screen dark mode in light theme - Fix missing _buildMainContent method causing theme wrapper failure - Add _buildMainContent(List<EmployeeData>, bool) method with proper theme handlin - Ensure admin team alerts responds correctly to light/dark mode switching - Maintain all existing functionality while adding theme awareness Fixes issue where admin Team Alerts & Nudges screen remained dark even when light mode was activated.
